tables.description: This subject consent file contains subject IDs, consent group information, and affection status. Cases were defined as individuals from REGICOR who were men with myocardial infarction (MI) before the age of 50 or women with MI before the age of 60. Controls were drawn from the larger population-based REGICOR study. Controls were defined as individuals who without a personal history of MI or any coronary revascularization and between the ages of 55 and 80.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject. Cases were defined as individuals from REGICOR who were men with myocardial infarction (MI) before the age of 50 or women with MI before the age of 60. Controls were drawn from the larger population-based REGICOR study. Controls were defined as individuals who without a personal history of MI or any coronary revascularization and between the ages of 55 and 80.

tables.description: This subject sample mapping file contains a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs. The data table also includes sample use.

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Type of data submitted. Seq_DNA_SNP_CNV: SNP and CNV genotypes derived from sequence data; Seq_DNA_WholeExome: Whole exome sequencing

tables.description: This subject phenotype data table contains gender of participants.
This sample attributes data table includes sample analyte type.
